response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r4c2's SoC (0.41) is only marginally above your minimum threshold (0.40), and sharing 0.5 kWh would risk dropping your own reserve below the critical 40% floor needed for household operations.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.41 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: SoC critically low after repeated energy sharing. Peers have not reciprocated. Switching to conservative mode to preserve minimum operational margin. Will only share if own SoC remains above 40% and only at 0.1 kW/tick rate..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
